name: @bolthub/verify
description: Verify bolthub gateway signatures on your origin server — Express, Fastify, or generic Node.js middleware

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm && cp dist/index.js dist/index.mjs && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs && bun x tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --declaration --project tsconfig.build.json
